violations.text: (Raw shrimp) was observed held at (51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Tamales was observed exceeding the 7 day datemarking. PIC informed of proper datemarking procedures.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Cooked shredded pork was observed being stored in non food grade plastic bags. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients ). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (basement ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

(Prep unit ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 51 DF. EStablishment is not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1.cookline prep unit shelves 2.dough mixer 3.equipment shelves 4.grill table 5.all refrigerations units 6.stove vents New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The (ceilings ) in the (basement) area is in poor repair.Observed water stains and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the(basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Inspector observed various food product being stored in plastic bags. PIC informed to cease practice and to use food grade materials to cover food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The floors under 3 bay sink and behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
